title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud services. It can disrupt operations, compromise sensitive data, and lead to financial losses due to ransom payments and downtime.
recommended_actions: Implement strict access controls and monitor CI/CD pipelines for unusual activity to prevent unauthorized deployments.
Ensure regular backups of critical data and store them in isolated environments to facilitate recovery in case of an attack.
Deploy advanced endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to identify and mitigate ransomware threats in real-time.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity.

title: A vulnerability was found in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This impacts the function...
description: A vulnerability was found in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This impacts the function setGameSpeedCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi. The manipulation of the argument enable results in os command injection. The attack may be performed from remote. The exploit has been made public and could be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5692.

title: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Hotel Booking 1.0. Affected by this...
description: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Online Hotel Booking 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /booknow.php of the component Booking Endpoint. Such manipulation of the argument roomname leads to cross site scripting. It is possible to launch the attack remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to execute cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks by exploiting the 'roomname' parameter in the /booknow.php endpoint. This can lead to data theft, session hijacking, or malicious redirection, potentially compromising user trust and system integrity.
recommended_actions: Sanitize and validate all user inputs, especially the 'roomname' parameter, to prevent XSS attacks.
Apply security patches or updates provided by the vendor or community for the affected application.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.

title: Unsanitized input in an OS command in the virtual desktop session name handling in AWS Research...
description:
Unsanitized input in an OS command in the virtual desktop session name handling in AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES) version 2025.03 through 2025.12.01 might allow a remote authenticated actor to execute arbitrary commands as root on the virtual desktop host via a crafted session name.

To remediate this issue, users are advised to upgrade to RES version 2026.03 or apply the corresponding mitigation patch to their existing environment.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5707.

Executing a manipulation of the argument enable can lead to os command injection. The attack can be executed remotely. The exploit has been published and may be used.

description:

title: A security vulnerability has been detected in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. Impacted is...
description: A security vulnerability has been detected in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. Impacted is the function setDdnsCfg of the file /cgi-bin/cstecgi.cgi. Such manipulation of the argument provider leads to os command injection. The attack may be launched remotely. The exploit has been disclosed publicly and may be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary OS commands via the setDdnsCfg function, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of Totolink A7100RU devices to the latest version if a patch is available.
Restrict access to the device's web interface by implementing strong access controls and network segmentation.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and implement intrusion detection systems to identify potential exploitation attempts.

title: A vulnerability has been found in Totolink A7100RU 7.4cu.2313_b20191024. This affects the...

The manipulation of the argument firewallType leads to os command injection. The attack is possible to be carried out remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used.

recommended_actions: Immediately update the firmware of Totolink A7100RU to the latest version if a patch is available. Monitor the vendor's website or security advisories for updates.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems and limit potential damage.
Enable logging and monitoring on affected devices to detect any unusual or unauthorized activity.

This manipulation of the argument page causes stack-based buffer overflow. The attack may be initiated remotely. The exploit has been made available to the public and could be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5687.

title: Unsanitized input in the FileBrowser API in AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES) version...
description:
Unsanitized input in the FileBrowser API in AWS Research and Engineering Studio (RES) version 2024.10 through 2025.12.01 might allow a remote authenticated actor to execute arbitrary commands on the cluster-manager EC2 instance via crafted input when using the FileBrowser functionality.

To remediate this issue, users are advised to upgrade to RES version 2026.03 or apply the corresponding mitigation patch to their existing environment.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5709.

title: A security flaw has been discovered in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. This vulnerability affects the...
description: A security flaw has been discovered in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. This vulnerability affects the function fromRouteStatic of the file /goform/RouteStatic. The manipulation of the argument page results in stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit has been released to the public and may be used for attacks.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Tenda CX12L firmware allows remote attackers to exploit a stack-based buffer overflow, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution, denial of service, or full system compromise. This poses significant risks to network devices and connected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Tenda CX12L firmware to the latest version if a patch is available.
Implement network segmentation to isolate vulnerable devices from critical systems.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and apply intrusion detection/prevention systems.

title: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. Affected by this issue is the function...
description: A vulnerability was determined in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12. Affected by this issue is the function fromwebExcptypemanFilter of the file /goform/webExcptypemanFilter. Executing a manipulation of the argument page can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack requires access to the local network. The exploit has been publicly disclosed and may be utilized.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Tenda CX12L 16.03.53.12 allows attackers with local network access to exploit a stack-based buffer overflow via the 'fromwebExcptypemanFilter' function, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution, denial of service, or unauthorized control of the device.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest firmware update or patch from Tenda to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to the local network by implementing strong network segmentation and access control policies.
Monitor network traffic for unusual activity and consider deploying intrusion detection/prevention systems (IDS/IPS) to detect exploitation attempts.

description: OCS Inventory NG Server version 2.12.3 and prior contain a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability that allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript by submitting malicious User-Agent HTTP headers to the /ocsinventory endpoint. Attackers can register rogue agents or craft requests with malicious User-Agent values that are stored without sanitation and rendered with insufficient encoding in the web console, leading to arbitrary JavaScript execution in the browsers of authent

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-22675.

title: PraisonAI Has Path Traversal in FileTools
description:
### Executive Summary:
The path validation has a critical logic bug: it checks for `..` AFTER `normpath()` has already collapsed all `..` sequences. This makes the check completely useless and allows trivial path traversal to any file on the system.
The path validation function also does not resolve the symlink wich could potentially cause path traversal.

### Details:
`_validate_path()` calls `os.path.normpath()` first, which collapses `..` sequences, then checks for `'..'` in normalized. Since

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35615.

title: PraisonAI recipe registry publish path traversal allows out-of-root file write
description:
### Summary

PraisonAI's recipe registry publish endpoint writes uploaded recipe bundles to a filesystem path derived from the bundle's internal `manifest.json` before it verifies that the manifest `name` and `version` match the HTTP route. A malicious publisher can place `../` traversal sequences in the bundle manifest and cause the registry server to create files outside the configured registry root even though the request is ultimately rejected with HTTP `400`.

This is an arbitrary file writ

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-39308.

title: PraisonAI recipe registry pull path traversal writes files outside the chosen output directory
description:
### Summary

PraisonAI's recipe registry pull flow extracts attacker-controlled `.praison` tar archives with `tar.extractall()` and does not validate archive member paths before extraction. A malicious publisher can upload a recipe bundle that contains `../` traversal entries and any user who later pulls that recipe will write files outside the output directory they selected.

This is a path traversal / arbitrary file write vulnerability on the client side of the recipe registry workflow. It aff

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows attackers to perform path traversal and write arbitrary files outside the intended output directory on the client system. This could lead to unauthorized file modifications, overwriting critical system files, or planting malicious executables, potentially compromising the affected system.
recommended_actions: Implement strict validation of archive member paths before extraction to prevent path traversal (e.g., sanitize paths and reject entries containing '../').
Update PraisonAI recipe registry to use secure extraction methods, such as libraries that enforce safe extraction practices.
Notify users of the vulnerability and advise them to avoid pulling untrusted recipe bundles until a patch is released.

title: PraisonAI Vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write / Path Traversal in Action Orchestrator
description:
The Action Orchestrator feature contains a Path Traversal vulnerability that allows an attacker (or compromised agent) to write to arbitrary files outside of the configured workspace directory. By supplying relative path segments (`../`) in the target path, malicious actions can overwrite sensitive system files or drop executable payloads on the host.

### Details
Location: `src/praisonai/praisonai/cli/features/action_orchestrator.py` (Lines 402, 409, 423)

Vulnerable Code snippet:
```python
tar

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The Path Traversal vulnerability in PraisonAI's Action Orchestrator allows attackers to write arbitrary files outside the workspace directory. This could lead to overwriting critical system files, deploying malicious payloads, and potentially gaining remote code execution, compromising the host system.
recommended_actions: Implement strict input validation to sanitize and restrict file paths, preventing the use of relative path segments (`../`).
Apply patches or updates to the affected `action_orchestrator.py` file to address the vulnerability as soon as possible.
Conduct a thorough security audit of the PraisonAI platform to identify and mitigate any other potential vulnerabilities.

title: PraisonAI Has Arbitrary File Write (Zip Slip) in Templates Extraction
description:
The PraisonAI templates installation feature is vulnerable to a "Zip Slip" Arbitrary File Write attack. When downloading and extracting template archives from external sources (e.g., GitHub), the application uses Python's `zipfile.extractall()` without verifying if the files within the archive resolve outside of the intended extraction directory. 

### Details
Location: `src/praisonai/praisonai/cli/features/templates.py` (Line 852)

Vulnerable Code snippet:
```python
zip_ref.extractall(tmpdir)
`

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-39307.

title: go-ipld-prime: DAG-CBOR decoder unbounded memory allocation from CBOR headers
description:
The DAG-CBOR decoder uses collection sizes declared in CBOR headers as Go preallocation hints for maps and lists. The decoder does not cap these size hints or account for their cost in its allocation budget, allowing small payloads to cause excessive memory allocation.

A CBOR map or list header can declare an arbitrarily large number of entries, causing the decoder to preallocate proportionally large backing structures before any entries are actually read. Because the allocation budget is only

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-35480.

title: CVE-2026-4020 - The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all version
description: The Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Sensitive Information Exposure in all versions up to, and including, 2.1.4. This is due to a REST API endpoint registered at /wp-json/gravitysmtp/v1/tests/mock-data with a permission_callback that unconditionally returns true, allowing any unauthenticated visitor to access it. When the ?page=gravitysmtp-settings query parameter is appended, the plugin's register_connector_data() method populates internal connector data, causing the endpoint to return approximately 365 KB of JSON containing the full System Report. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to retrieve detailed system configuration data including PHP version, loaded extensions, web server version, document root path, database server type and version, WordPress version, all active plugins with versions, active theme, WordPress configuration details, database table names, and any API keys/tokens configured in the plugin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Gravity SMTP plugin for WordPress allows unauthenticated attackers to access sensitive information via an exposed REST API endpoint. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized access to email configurations, and potential exploitation of email systems for phishing or spam campaigns.
recommended_actions: Immediately update or disable the Gravity SMTP plugin until a patched version is released by the vendor.
Restrict access to the REST API endpoint using web server rules or a WordPress security plugin to block unauthenticated access.
Audit your WordPress installation for signs of unauthorized access or data exposure, focusing on email configurations and logs.

title: CVE-2026-3300 - The Everest Forms Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via PHP Code Injec
description: The Everest Forms Pro plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Remote Code Execution via PHP Code Injection in all versions up to, and including, 1.9.12. This is due to the Calculation Addon's process_filter() function concatenating user-submitted form field values into a PHP code string without proper escaping before passing it to eval(). The sanitize_text_field() function applied to input does not escape single quotes or other PHP code context characters. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject and execute arbitrary PHP code on the server by submitting a crafted value in any string-type form field (text, email, URL, select, radio) when a form uses the "Complex Calculation" feature.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code on the server, potentially leading to full system compromise, data exfiltration, or unauthorized access to sensitive information. This can severely impact the integrity, confidentiality, and availability of affected systems.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Everest Forms Pro plugin to a patched version (if available) or disable the plugin until a fix is released.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.
Conduct a security audit of your WordPress site to identify and remediate any unauthorized changes or backdoors that may have been introduced.

title: CVE-2026-5115 - The PaperCut NG/MF (specifically, the embedded application for Konica Minolta devices) is vulnerable
description:
The PaperCut NG/MF (specifically, the embedded application for Konica Minolta devices) is vulnerable to session hijacking. The PaperCut NG/MF Embedded application is a software interface that runs directly on the touch screen of a multi-function device.

It was internally discovered that the communication channel between the embedded application and the server was insecure, which could leak data including sensitive information that may be used to mount an  attack on the device. Such an attack could potentially be used to steal data or to perform a phishing attack on the end user.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5115.

title: CVE-2026-4794 - Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in PaperCut NG/MF before 25.0.10 allow authentic
description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in PaperCut NG/MF before 25.0.10 allow authenticated administrator users to inject arbitrary web script or HTML code via different UI fields. This could be used to compromise other admininistrator's sessions or perform unauthorized actions via the administrator's authenticated context (e.g. requires an active login session).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4794.

description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS has DOM-based cross-site scripting in tag creation. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

title: CVE-2026-30940 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a path traversal vulnerability
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, a path traversal vulnerability exists in the theme file management API (/baser/api/admin/bc-theme-file/theme_files/add.json) that allows arbitrary file write. An authenticated administrator can include ../ sequences in the path parameter to create a PHP file in an arbitrary directory outside the theme directory, which may result in remote code execution (RCE). This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-30940.

title: CVE-2026-21861 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS contains an OS command
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, baserCMS contains an OS command injection vulnerability in the core update functionality. An authenticated administrator can execute arbitrary OS commands on the server due to improper handling of user-controlled input that is directly passed to exec() without sufficient validation or escaping. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21861.

title: CVE-2025-32957 - baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, the application's restore funct
description: baserCMS is a website development framework. Prior to version 5.2.3, the application's restore function allows users to upload a .zip file, which is then automatically extracted. A PHP file inside the archive is included using require_once without validating or restricting the filename. An attacker can craft a malicious PHP file within the zip and achieve arbitrary code execution when it is included. This issue has been patched in version 5.2.3.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2025-32957.
